steps.title: Use the two zeros
steps.content:
The graph has zeros at $x=10$ and $x=-4$, so the function can be written as:
$$f(x)=a(x-10)(x+4)$$

steps.title: Choose an integer value
steps.content:
The coefficient $b$ is $-6a$, so:
$$a+b=a-6a=-5a$$
Since $a$ is an integer greater than $1$, $a=2$ gives $a+b=-10$. The answer is A.
